ddls:
CREATE TABLE "addresses" (
  "address_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each address */,
  "street" TEXT /* Street of the address */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the address */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the address */,
  "zip" INTEGER /* Zip code of the address */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("address_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the customer */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the customer */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level of the customer */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the customer */,
  "hobbies" TEXT /* Hobbies of the customer */,
  "relationship" TEXT /* Relationship status of the customer */,
  "annual_income" REAL /* Annual income of the customer */,
  "address_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer's address */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* License number of the customer */,
  "license_state" TEXT /* License state of the customer */,
  "driving_experience" INTEGER /* Driving experience of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "policies" (
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each policy */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who purchased the policy */,
  "policy_number" INTEGER /* Policy number */,
  "policy_bind_date" TEXT /* Date the policy was bound */,
  "policy_state" TEXT /* State where the policy was purchased */,
  "policy_csl" TEXT /* Coverage limits of the policy */,
  "policy_deductable" INTEGER /* Deductible amount of the policy */,
  "policy_annual_premium" REAL /* Annual premium of the policy */,
  "umbrella_limit" INTEGER /* Umbrella limit of the policy */,
  "coverage_type" TEXT /* Type of coverage (e.g., liability, collision, comprehensive) */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Effective date of the policy */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Expiration date of the policy */,
  "premium_payment_frequency" TEXT /* Premium payment frequency (e.g., monthly, annually) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_policies_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "claims" (
  "claim_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each claim */,
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the policy associated with the claim */,
  "incident_date" TEXT /* Date of the incident */,
  "incident_type" TEXT /* Type of incident (e.g., single vehicle collision, theft) */,
  "collision_type" TEXT /* Type of collision (e.g., side collision, rear collision) */,
  "incident_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the incident (e.g., minor damage, major damage) */,
  "authorities_contacted" TEXT /* Authorities contacted (e.g., police, none) */,
  "incident_state" TEXT /* State where the incident occurred */,
  "incident_city" TEXT /* City where the incident occurred */,
  "incident_location" TEXT /* Location of the incident */,
  "claim_description" TEXT /* Description of the claim */,
  "reported_date" TEXT /* Date the claim was reported */,
  "received_date" TEXT /* Date the claim was received by the insurer */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the claim (e.g., open, closed, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("claim_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claims_policy_id FOREIGN KEY ("policy_id") REFERENCES policies ("policy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "claim_details" (
  "claim_id" INTEGER /* ID of the claim */,
  "incident_hour_of_the_day" INTEGER /* Hour of the day when the incident occurred */,
  "number_of_vehicles_involved" INTEGER /* Number of vehicles involved in the incident */,
  "property_damage" TEXT /* Type of property damage (e.g., yes, no) */,
  "bodily_injuries" INTEGER /* Number of bodily injuries */,
  "witnesses" INTEGER /* Number of witnesses */,
  "police_report_available" TEXT /* Availability of police report (e.g., yes, no) */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions at the time of the incident */,
  "road_conditions" TEXT /* Road conditions at the time of the incident */,
  "additional_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the incident */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("claim_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "claim_amounts" (
  "claim_id" INTEGER /* ID of the claim */,
  "total_claim_amount" REAL /* Total claim amount */,
  "injury_claim" REAL /* Injury claim amount */,
  "property_claim" REAL /* Property claim amount */,
  "vehicle_claim" REAL /* Vehicle claim amount */,
  "deductible_amount" REAL /* Deductible amount */,
  "total_payout_amount" REAL /* Total payout amount */,
  "additional_fees" REAL /* Additional fees associated with the claim */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("claim_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "claim_id" INTEGER /* ID of the claim associated with the vehicle */,
  "auto_make" TEXT /* Make of the vehicle */,
  "auto_model" TEXT /* Model of the vehicle */,
  "auto_year" INTEGER /* Year of the vehicle */,
  "vin" TEXT /* VIN of the vehicle */,
  "license_plate_number" TEXT /* License plate number of the vehicle */,
  "license_plate_state" TEXT /* License plate state of the vehicle */,
  "safety_features" TEXT /* Safety features of the vehicle (e.g., airbags, anti-lock brakes) */,
  "fraud_reported" TEXT /* Whether the vehicle was reported for fraud */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_claim_id FOREIGN KEY ("claim_id") REFERENCES claims ("claim_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "insured" (
  "insured_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each insured individual */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer associated with the insured individual */,
  "insured_zip" INTEGER /* Zip code of the insured individual */,
  "insured_sex" TEXT /* Sex of the insured individual */,
  "insured_education_level" TEXT /* Education level of the insured individual */,
  "insured_occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the insured individual */,
  "insured_hobbies" TEXT /* Hobbies of the insured individual */,
  "insured_relationship" TEXT /* Relationship status of the insured individual */,
  "relationship_to_policyholder" TEXT /* Relationship of the insured individual to the policyholder */,
  "coverage_type" TEXT /* Type of coverage (e.g., primary, secondary) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("insured_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_insured_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agents" (
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agent */,
  "agent_name" TEXT /* Name of the agent */,
  "agent_email" TEXT /* Email of the agent */,
  "agent_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the agent */,
  "agency_name" TEXT /* Name of the agency */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* License number of the agent */,
  "license_state" TEXT /* License state of the agent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "adjusters" (
  "adjuster_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each adjuster */,
  "adjuster_name" TEXT /* Name of the adjuster */,
  "adjuster_email" TEXT /* Email of the adjuster */,
  "adjuster_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the adjuster */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* License number of the adjuster */,
  "license_state" TEXT /* License state of the adjuster */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("adjuster_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "claim_status" (
  "claim_id" INTEGER /* ID of the claim */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the claim (e.g., open, closed, pending) */,
  "status_date" TEXT /* Date the claim status was updated */,
  "status_update_date" TEXT /* Date the claim status was last updated */,
  "status_update_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the claim status update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("claim_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "claim_history" (
  "claim_id" INTEGER /* ID of the claim */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., claim submission, claim approval) */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "additional_information" TEXT /* Additional information about the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("claim_id")
)
